title: Web-to-Cloud: VCN Egress and Exfil Flows
description: Surfaces accepted VCN Flow Log records from the compromised application host to the C2/exfil destination and OCI service endpoints. Large Bytes Sent values provide the primary network indicator for data loss.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Source IP' = '10.0.1.50' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77') | stats count as Flows, unique('Action') as Actions, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent, unique('Flow ID') as FlowIds by 'Source IP', 'Destination IP', 'Destination Port', 'Trace ID' | sort -Flows

ask_ai_prompts: Which VCN flows show the largest outbound transfer?
Map the compromised private IP to the external C2 destination.

falsepositives: Approved bulk export from application subnet
